cards.name: Multi Energy
cards.text: While in play, Multi Energy provides every type of Energy but provides only 1 Energy at a time. Multi Energy provides Colorless Energy when attached to a Pokémon that already has Special Energy cards attached to it.

tests.name: multi_energy_provides_all_types
tests.description: Test that Multi Energy provides all types

tests.name: multi_energy_colorless_with_special
tests.description: Test that Multi Energy provides Colorless if other special energy attached
